w:r.w:t: Segun is an experienced technical leader with

of experience leading teams delivering enterprise-level projects within Financial Services. Segun has delivered multiple high profile regulatory projects in challenging circumstances across large teams, proving his ability to grasp and deliver the customer goals under pressure. As a strategic technology leader his goal is to lead and grow his technology team/organisation to meet and exceed expectations through exceptional expectation management and creative delivery in terms of resourcing and technical approach, while building for strategic agility. He is also an MBA
Excellent ability to present strategic technical insights to C-level stakeholders.
managing project budgets and resource plans to ensure delivery within commercial expectations.
Capable of providing cost-benefit analysis of multiple streams of project delivery
Experienced working with 3rd party vendors to deliver enterprise integrations.
MBA @ Warwick Business School including modules covering
Adoption & Change Management in the Inter
Dealer Broker Industry: A Case Study of BGC Group, focused on equipping my organization for AI adoption and rollout of

PESTLE, Porter’s 5 forces, VRIO and Business model analysis, ESCO, statistical process control – able to apply the correct models to any strategic or process challenge to develop organisational solutions to increase strategic agility and provide solutions to senior and executive management.
Financial Services, Insurance, Formula 1 Technology R&D.
Initial Margin Calculations, Effective Positive Exposure Calculations, Basel I, II & III requirements, COREP & FINREP
Extensive experience consulting with clients including Credit Suisse, BAML & TD Securities
Highly experienced in architecting and leading technical delivery of enterprise solutions.
Comfortable working on complex integration challenges across multiple interfaces.
with excellent experience of AI/ML augmented
I am experienced in working with delivery, infrastructure & BAU teams to ensure a smooth transition from development to go-live.
Comfortable providing technical insights within challenging or unfamiliar contexts by applying established principles and best practices.
Experienced leading internal, external, senior & junior professionals within cross-functional teams of business analysts, software developers and QA engineers both on &
Experienced in delivering the benefits of agile software development throughout the SDLC.
Act as agile mentor within delivery environments.
Experienced in all areas of software testing principles and practices (TDD, BDD, Automation).
Experienced in numerous DevOps technologies and platforms.
Comfortable leading large and multiple teams.
Bristol UWE, Bristol, UK, B.Sc., Computer Science 2:1, July 2005
Highly experienced working directly with client subject matter experts at all levels.
Excel VSTO & Excel VBA, PowerShell, Bash, Ansible, JavaScript, Python.
, Entity Framework/Dapper/Simple Data, Log4net/Common Logging Framework,
, Web API .NET 4.5, Nancy FX, Spring Boot, Spring, WPF, WCF,
GIT, Subversion, TFS, Cruise Control, Team City, Jenkins
Kick boxing brown belt, active member of local church music and youth activities team, piano player
BGC Technology (a part of the BGC Group), 5 Churchill Place Canary Wharf London E14 5RD

BGC Group is one of the world's largest inter-broker dealerships, the largest energy and commodities broker and one of the world’s leading providers of OTC pricing data. BGC Group provides for clients in Rates, FX & Money Markets, Equities and Credit products, providing price discovery and dissemination services, trading interest and trading strategies.
front and middle office trade booking platforms.

I owned technical delivery across 4 strategic global trade booking systems. I was tasked with building relationships with key stakeholders across the different systems and upselling the products to the various business we support.
irector of EMEA trading and liaised with CTO and multiple CIO
stakeholders throughout, presenting technology insights and reporting progress.

Led multiple executive presentations of the AI Technology initiatives owned by my group to convince stakeholders to adopt it as a strategic brokerage automation mode for desks. Worked extensively with Equities and Commodities senior leaders and brokers. Engaging with senior brokers to increase adoption of AI
Worked extensively with Open AI and Anthropic models to increase
software delivery quality and delivery speed via AI integration in QA and development workflows.
Extended and integrated an NLP solution responsible for saving
Drove adoption of the solution across multiple teams internationally.
Mentored team members and implemented programs to improve team behaviours, resulting in increased cohesion and fewer production issues.
Developed a team training platform using Pluralsight to ensure all team members had access to the requisite training to be effective across all key technologies.
Monitored adoption and usage to visualise deficiencies and proactively address them.
Worked within Azure, AWS and on premises hosting
driven coding using LLM models to define requirements, derive tasks and executed development tasks against existing codebases, seeing a 50%approx increase in development team throughput as a result.
Defined development, product strategy and QA engineering workflows based around the use of AI agents to drive all aspects of the Agile workflow using
agents. Embedded AI in the SDLC.
I both led the rollout and coded the initial proof of concepts myself to demonstrate the efficacy of “context engineering” in the financial services

Built out LLM-powered AI solutions to improve operational efficiency. Interacted daily with C-level AI/ML executives to drive forwards AI & Technology strategy. Interviewed staff at many levels of the organisation to understand and design plans to neutralise organisational antibodies resistant to AI enablement.
AI Adoption & Change Management in the Inter-Broker Dealership industry”
focused on AI adoption within BGC and the cultural, learning and strategic changes required to make such a change effective.

Performed strategic analysis of competitors using PESTLE, Porters 5 forces, ESCO, VRIO and Business model analysis, to understand our market position, strengths and weaknesses and ultimately to advise on where the product roadmap should focus
informed parties and internal senior stakeholders on
and costing aspects to ensure solutions were fit for purpose,
Worked with business managers and desk heads across New York, Singapore, Australia, Hong Kong & London to ensure technical product vision me
Provide product strategy support, delivering requirement engineering and project planning for multiple streams of delivery.
Created strategy based on a Balanced Score Card approach, designed to improve innovation efforts across the BGC businesses.
Designed and executed employee engagement surveys to gauge team satisfaction and improve engagement, while tying initiatives to future strategic goals.
processes to ensure fluent deliver and operational efficiency.
Working to consolidate multiple global applications within a consolidated monitoring platform to offer central logging and traceability capabilities across all stacks.
Pioneered testing and DevOps initiatives to reduce production revenue and compliance impacts to a minimum.
innovation across the EMEA, APAC & AMER technology teams
through knowledge sharing and demonstrations of appropriate and compliant
Pioneered the creation of an extensible AI business workflow framework that could be
re-used by technology teams across the organisation with minimal friction.
Worked closely with Senior MD of EMEA Trading to ensure alignment with
Worked with Brokerage CTO to ensure alignment with Global strategy
Head of AI ML to ensure AI engineering architecture
enhance adoption and support ease of rollout and consumption.
Intrepid Consulting, 10 Lower Thames St, London EC3R 6AF
Co-Led the establishment of a software development account within a global investment bank TD Securities. Established effective relationships that translated into repeated extensions of engagement.
Delivered 600K+ of revenue in my first year of managing this account.
Associate Partner responsible for leading technical teams and for revenue targets within the Financial Services area.
Intrepid surpassed £1m in revenue for 3 years in a row in 2019 - 2021 and surpassed £1.5M in 2021.
Expanded our reach into multiple areas of business within the client.
Secured a Global Master Agreement for my company through exceptional delivery and relationship management.
Established relationships with C level stakeholders and presented strategic insights around their technical estate to secure funding for regulatory programs.
Successfully secured repeat extensions of funding based on personal relationships and demonstrable technical excellence.

Consulted for clients including Credit Suisse & TD Securities, providing technical and architecture consultancy, mentorship, reporting to C-Level stakeholders and driving regulatory technology programmes.

Provided process flow and layout analysis (4Vs, key performance objectives) to optimise global support processes for the Credit Risk team of a tier 1 investment bank. My reports resulted in recommendations for are-organisation of support interfaces with global trading teams to improve support ticket throughput.
Provided statistical process analysis to identify control breaks and suggest pre-emptive mitigations and optimised rotas.
Bank of America Merrill Lynch, 2 King
Edward St, London EC1A 1HQ (via Allegis Group)
Credit Suisse, Cabot Square, London, UK
(leading team of 15 individuals across QA/development/BA and project management disciplines)
